data.title: John Fetterman First Democratic Lawmaker To Accept Trump Invitation To Mar-a-Lago Since 2024 Election
data.description: Fetterman, a Dem senator, to meet with Trump at Mar-a-Lago, saying he's willing to work with anyone for PA. Previously clashed but now almost friends.

data.title: What's Going On With D-Wave Quantum Stock Today?
data.description: D-Wave Quantum announced strong fiscal 2024 bookings growth and a major system sale, amid CEO Alan Baratz's criticism of Nvidia's quantum timeline.

data.title: Dollar Soars To 27-Month Highs, 30-Year Yields Hit 5%, Stocks Tumble As Jobs Report, Oil Spike Darken Fed's Interest Rate Cut Hopes
data.description: Strong jobs report fuels Fed hawkishness, spurs market fears. Unemployment drops, wages rise, rates may not be cut until 2025. Dollar and yields jump.

data.title: Bitcoin Fights To Regain $94,000: What Does Technical Analysis Say?
